Live session + recording · €24

The real problem

Your body does not
open under pressure.
It opens under safety.

You've been doing what you were told — tracking your cycle, eating right, taking supplements, trying to stay positive. And still, something feels off.

Because this isn't just about what you're doing. It's about the state your body is in while you're doing it.

Right now, most women are trying to conceive from a place of:

  • Chronic stress and overthinking
  • Emotional holding and past patterns
  • Nervous system overload
  • Pressure to "get it right"

That's what we change in this workshop.

What you'll understand

This is where things
start to make sense.

Why your body may not be responding — even if everything "looks fine"

The connection between stress, hormones, and fertility

How your nervous system directly impacts conception

Why doing more is not always the answer — and what actually works

You won't just understand. You will feel the difference.

A guided breathwork practice is included — so your body shifts, not just your mind.

"This is not a medical class. This is not more information. This is about helping your body feel safe enough to do what it already knows."

Proven in person

500+ women have
experienced this shift.

Including a sold-out breathwork and conscious conception session at Google — and women across Ireland, India, the US, and beyond.

The April 17th workshop brings this same depth — live, on Zoom, with Oshika holding the space.

“You held the space so compassionately. From the beginning I felt safe.”

Breathwork session client

This is for you if

You're ready to
understand your body —
